workflow.search: site search box profile candidate, disabled until live selector tests pass
workflow.sort: site sort/filter controls profile candidate, disabled until live selector tests pass
workflow.candidateSelection: cheapest eligible product, then highest seller rating
workflow.detailRecheck: product detail or seller selector recheck before cart action
workflow.cartVerification: cart summary must contain selected product before stop

candidateFields.price: DOM text first, visual fallback only after profile tests
candidateFields.sellerRating: seller rating text or ARIA first, visual star fallback only after profile tests
candidateFields.availability: stock text or disabled add-to-cart control

enablementGates: Hepsiburada selector dry-run extraction tests pass
detail recheck confidence threshold is met
